x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Building assignments on space records enable Now Assist WSD to provide location-aware AI space recommendations. Without building data, AI cannot filter spaces by proximity to the employee or their team.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No space records found", finding: "No space records found. Location coverage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaLoc = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); gaLoc.addQuery("building", "!=", ""); gaLoc.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaLoc.query(); var withBuilding = gaLoc.next() ? parseInt(gaLoc.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withBuilding / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of spaces have a building assigned (" + withBuilding + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 90) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of spaces have building assignments. Now Assist WSD can provide accurate location-aware AI space recommendations." }; } else if (pct >= 60) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of spaces have building assignments (target: 90%+). Now Assist WSD AI location filtering will have incomplete coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of spaces have building assignments. Now Assist WSD cannot provide location-aware AI recommendations without building data on spaces." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Assign building references to all space records in Workplace Core. Building data is required for Now Assist WSD to filter and recommend spaces by employee location.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccb
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Building assignments on space records enable Now Assist WSD to provide location-aware AI space recommendations. Without building data, AI cannot filter spaces by proximity to the employee or their team.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Location Coverage on Spaces</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No space records found", finding: "No space records found. Location coverage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaLoc = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); gaLoc.addQuery("building", "!=", ""); gaLoc.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaLoc.query(); var withBuilding = gaLoc.next() ? parseInt(gaLoc.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withBuilding / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of spaces have a building assigned (" + withBuilding + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 90) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of spaces have building assignments. Now Assist WSD can provide accurate location-aware AI space recommendations." }; } else if (pct >= 60) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of spaces have building assignments (target: 90%+). Now Assist WSD AI location filtering will have incomplete coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of spaces have building assignments. Now Assist WSD cannot provide location-aware AI recommendations without building data on spaces." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>WSD</module> <number>CHK0006231</number> <order>900</order> <remediation_guidance>Assign building references to all space records in Workplace Core. Building data is required for Now Assist WSD to filter and recommend spaces by employee location.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccb</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
